---
title: "Insurance Register"
imgSrc: "../../assets/images/archive.webp"
imgAlt: "Facade of Greek Parliament"
description: "A list of (re)insurance companies in Greece and insurance sub-sectors"
periodText: "PERIOD"
period: "2022"
recordsText: "RECORDS"
records: "973"
languageText: "LANGUAGE"
languageAns: "Greek / English"
exploreDatasetText: "Explore dataset"
toc: true
toc-location: left
comments: false
lang: en
---

::: {.text-center .lh-lg}
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> `Programming Language`: R <br>
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> `Software`: rvest <br>
<i class="bi bi-database"></i> `Data Source`: [Bank of Greece](https://www.bankofgreece.gr/) <br>
<i class="bi bi-list-ol"></i> `# of observations - rows`: 973 <br>
<i class="bi bi-list-ol"></i> `# of variables - columns`: 9 <br>
<i class="bi bi-translate"></i> `Languages`:  🇬🇧  / 🇬🇷 <br>
<i class="bi bi-activity"></i> `Frequency `: Μη επαναλαμβανόμενο
:::


:::{.d-flex .flex-column .flex-sm-row .justify-content-center .gap-3 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .p-2}
```{=html}
<div><a href="https://github.com/stesiam/scrape-greek-parl-members-26/releases/tag/v1.1.0" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-database"></i> Data</a></div>
<div><a href="https://github.com/stesiam/scrape-greek-parl-members-26" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Repository</a></div>
```
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(gt)

source("../../../posts/utils.R")

url = "https://github.com/stesiam/insuranceRegister/releases/download/v1.0.0/GRins.csv"


readr::read_csv(url) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ifelse(nchar(.) > 80, paste0(substr(., 1, 80), "…"), .))) %>%
  gt_custom(use_labels = FALSE, head_max = Inf) %>%
  opt_interactive(
    use_compact_mode = TRUE,  # tighter rows
    page_size_default = 10
  )
```
